(1} These rules may be called the Railway (Notices of and Inquiries into Accidents) Amendment Rules, 2013. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette, 2, in the Railway (Notices of and Inquiries into Accidents) Rules, 1998, for the words "twenty five lakh rupees" and letters and figures "Rs.25,00,000" wherever they occur, the words "rupees two crore" shall be substituted. [F. No. 2000/Safety (A & R)/19/20 Pt.] SUNIL KUMAR, Adviser/Safety Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number GSR: 5,^dated the 2" January, 1999 and subsequently amended vide numbers GSR 64, dated the 6 March, 1999 and 858 (E), dated the 22nd November, 2001.
